name: thanos-install
description: Thanos — Pi harness config layer. One-command installer.

scripts.test:unit: vitest run tests/agents tests/audit tests/evaluation tests/goal tests/governance tests/interaction tests/memory tests/permissions tests/policy tests/spec tests/review tests/waves tests/welcome tests/web
scripts.test:prompts: vitest run tests/prompt-system tests/evaluation/prompt-boundary.test.ts tests/goal/prompts.test.ts tests/goal/verdict.test.ts tests/review/jury.test.ts tests/waves/prompt.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: vitest run tests/hooks tests/index.test.ts tests/index.modes.test.ts tests/index.models.test.ts tests/index.delivery-select.test.ts tests/index.subagent-delivery.test.ts tests/commands tests/observability tests/ui-utils.test.ts
scripts.test:security: vitest run tests/security tests/permissions/yolo-lock.test.ts tests/permissions/yolo-config.test.ts tests/mcp/oauth.test.ts tests/mcp/client.test.ts tests/mcp/lifecycle.test.ts tests/mcp/state.test.ts tests/mcp
scripts.ci: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test
